claim: whether a pair (C,C') of equal-generation cylinders creates a cross-cylinder collinear triple is DECIDABLE purely from (Delta, sigma, sigma') below a BOUNDED escape horizon (no unbounded look-ahead)
one_line: cof(M) is EXACT-verified and the cross-cylinder Omega integer form is derived & code-verified, but the operative (separation/near-collinearity) content of the predicate needs UNBOUNDED 3-adic look-ahead: an explicit LEGAL family has normalized cross-chord parallelism EXCESS = v3(U1 x U2) = 2n-1 -> infinity. The finite-automaton route to OSC is DEAD by the task's own criterion (one unbounded-lookahead case = FAILS).

part1_exact_form_PROVEN.L2_inheritance: Omega(Mp,Mq,Mr) = cof(M).Omega(p,q,r)  -- verified EXACT over 421875 exhaustive-small + 200000 random-large integer triples

cross_cylinder_Omega.setup: p in C (root M^g a), q,r in C' (root M^g a'); d1=q-p, d2=r-p; Omega=d1 x d2
cross_cylinder_Omega.digit_expansion: d1 = sum_{j=0..g} M^(g-j) c1_j, d2 = sum_{j=0..g} M^(g-j) c2_j; c1_0=c2_0=delta=a'-a (SHARED leading root digit); c1_j=s^q_j-s^p_j, c2_j=s^r_j-s^p_j (stitch-offset differences, reach<=4)
cross_cylinder_Omega.EXACT_form: Omega = sum_{l=0..g} cof(M)^(g-l) B_l,   B_l = c1_l x c2_l + sum_{i<l}(M^(l-i) c1_i) x c2_l + sum_{j<l} c1_l x (M^(l-j) c2_j)
cross_cylinder_Omega.verified: EXACT == direct Omega over 20000 random cross-triples, g in 1..8
cross_cylinder_Omega.B0: c1_0 x c2_0 = delta x delta = 0  (identically; leading digit shared)
cross_cylinder_Omega.B1: sigma1 x tau1 + Delta x (tau1 - sigma1),  Delta = M.delta   (verified)
cross_cylinder_Omega.valuation_ordering: cof(M)=3N so v3(cof(M)^(g-l) B_l) >= (g-l): Omega mod 3^L depends only on the L FINEST digit blocks -> a 3-adic tower read from finest scale up

part2_horizon_FAILS.why_deep_tail_does_NOT_give_a_horizon: min|M^3 v|=24 > 2*reach bounds CROWDING (>=2 deep points cannot share a Cheb-4 ball) but NOT COLLINEARITY: collinear points spread along a LINE, not packed in a ball. So the packing/escape argument cannot certify non-collinearity of a straddling triple.
part2_horizon_FAILS.the_real_obstruction: The predicate the joint automaton must carry is SEPARATION (normalized cross-chord gap bounded below), not exact Omega=0 (which is trivially NO in any triple-free walk). Under one level of joint descent Omega' = cof(M).Omega + birth. cof(M) == 0 mod 3 (rank 0), so the normalized-separation direction is NON-ABSORBING: modular escape (the E3 analogue) carries ZERO separation content and floods -- exactly the failure of all 4 prior decoupled attempts.

EXPLICIT_UNBOUNDED_WITNESS.family: pure-M (anchor-backbone) descent: e1=e2=0 at every level; base cross-chords d1_0=(0,-1,-1)=q-p, d2_0=(0,-1,0)=r-p, i.e. p=(0,0,0), q=(0,-1,-1), r=(0,-1,0)
EXPLICIT_UNBOUNDED_WITNESS.legal: base triple NON-collinear (Omega_0=(-1,0,0)!=0); descendants M^n{p,q,r} collinear iff base collinear (L2, cof(M) invertible over Q) -> NEVER -> triple-free/legal at every generation; e=0 (anchor child) is always in the menu
EXPLICIT_UNBOUNDED_WITNESS.mechanism: (-1,0,0) is an EXACT eigenvector of cof(M) with eigenvalue 9 = 3^2; ALL eigenvalues of cof(M) have modulus 9. Hence Omega_n = cof(M)^n Omega_0 = 9^n (-1,0,0) EXACTLY (code-verified n=0..12).
EXPLICIT_UNBOUNDED_WITNESS.consequence: v3(Omega_n) = 2n grows unboundedly while v3(d1)+v3(d2) stays = 1; EXCESS = v3(U1 x U2) = 2n - 1 -> infinity; normalized cross-chord separation ~ 3^-(2n-1) -> 0.
EXPLICIT_UNBOUNDED_WITNESS.meaning: the two cross-chords' PRIMITIVE parts stay 3-adically parallel to depth 2n-1 (growing with generation) while remaining non-collinear. No fixed residue window / bounded horizon can distinguish this near-parallel LEGAL family from an exactly-parallel one, nor certify a uniform separation. Deciding the separation-relevant predicate needs look-ahead that GROWS with g.

part2_horizon_FAILS.horizon_bound: state-determined only while EXCESS < K_MAX=3, i.e. n<=1 (EXCESS 0,1). For n>=2 EXCESS>=3 exceeds the held window and (n>=4) the valuation exceeds the whole horizon A_CAP+K_MAX=7, but the escape is NON-ABSORBING (cof(M)=0 mod 3) so it certifies nothing. Effective certifiable horizon L* <= 1 level; the witness needs 2n-1 -> unbounded.
part2_horizon_FAILS.adversarial_beam_confirmation: coupled cross-chord beam (offset cube {-1,0,1}^3, no legality needed since near-parallel is legal) reaches max FINITE EXCESS = 4,6,8,9,...,24 monotone through 20 levels -- no saturation; matches the pure-M linear law.

reconciliation.with_prior_rounds: consistent with the memory's 3^-(g-1) boundary-gap DECAY, the inheritance-panel finding 'cof(M)==0 mod 3 => live-phase separation NOT absorbing', the decoupled floods, and p_unconditional~0.12-0.15.
reconciliation.strict_vs_operative: STRICT reading (decide exact Omega=0): trivially YES (always NO in a triple-free walk) but USELESS for the automaton. OPERATIVE reading (carry the separation the OSC automaton needs): FAILS -- unbounded look-ahead. Either way the finite-automaton route to OSC is DEAD.
reconciliation.root_cause: cof(M) == 0 mod 3 (rank 0) with all eigenvalues of modulus 3^2: the cross-product Omega, which controls collinearity/separation, evolves by a map that is identically singular mod 3, so its normalized/primitive part is not held under descent and the separation is non-absorbing.

scripts: design/osc/pair_horizon/omega_form.py  (+ omega_form_results.json)  -- exact cof(M), L2, decomposition identity, constants
design/osc/pair_horizon/horizon_search.py (+ _results.json) -- adversarial coupled beam, EXCESS unbounded
